watchlist_funds.bio: Warren Buffett's holding company and the most-watched institutional portfolio in the world. Long-horizon value investing; very large, concentrated positions held for years.
Bill Ackman's activist fund. Runs a very concentrated book (usually 8-12 large positions) and often takes public activist stances on its holdings.
watchlist_funds.sector: Activist / concentrated large-cap (consumer, financials, real estate)

watchlist_funds.bio: The world's largest macro hedge fund, founded by Ray Dalio. 13F shows its US equity sleeve - broad, systematically managed positions.
Stanley Druckenmiller's family office. Famous for aggressive, high-conviction macro and growth bets and for moving early on big themes (AI, GLP-1s).
David Tepper's fund, known for bold contrarian and distressed bets and heavy tech/China exposure in recent years.
The quantitative fund founded by Jim Simons. Thousands of algorithmically chosen positions - watch aggregate value trend rather than single names.

watchlist_politicians.name: Nancy Pelosi
watchlist_politicians.bio: Former Speaker of the House. Disclosed trades are made largely by spouse Paul Pelosi, a venture capitalist; historically concentrated in large-cap tech, often via call options (the famous 'Pelosi LEAPS').

watchlist_politicians.name: Ro Khanna
watchlist_politicians.bio: Represents Silicon Valley. One of the highest filing volumes in Congress - trades are mostly spouse and dependent family trusts, broadly diversified.
watchlist_politicians.sector: Diversified family trusts; sits on Armed Services

watchlist_politicians.name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
watchlist_politicians.bio: Frequent filer with broad single-stock purchases across sectors; buys have drawn attention for timing around policy events.

watchlist_politicians.name: Michael McCaul
watchlist_politicians.bio: Senior member on Foreign Affairs. One of the wealthiest members of Congress; very high disclosed trade volume, largely family accounts.
watchlist_politicians.sector: Diversified; defense/tech relevant to committee work

watchlist_politicians.name: Josh Gottheimer
watchlist_politicians.bio: Sits on Financial Services and Intelligence. Among the most active traders in the House, frequently in tech and financials.

watchlist_politicians.name: Tommy Tuberville
watchlist_politicians.bio: Senator and former college football coach; announced a 2026 run for Alabama governor. An active trader whose agriculture and defense-adjacent trades have drawn scrutiny given committee seats.
watchlist_politicians.sector: Broad, incl. agriculture and defense-adjacent names
